input.background: We've established that heights of 10-year-old boys vary according to a Normal distribution with μ=138 centimeters and σ=7 centimeters.
input.question: What proportion of this population is less than 150 centimeters tall?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
output.answer: The proportion of the population less than 150 centimeters tall is 0.9564.

height.description: The height of 10-year-old boys in centimeters.

mean_height.description: The mean height of 10-year-old boys in the population.

std_dev_height.description: The standard deviation of the height of 10-year-old boys in the population.

threshold_height.description: The height threshold in centimeters to determine the proportion of the population below this height.
